title: Frostburn
description: A blue and white pack for diamond armor and hearts with the intent of making Minecraft slightly more aesthetic :)
body:
This pack adds blue hearts and snow colored diamond armor to Minecraft for a more aesthetic diamond armor look. Many SMPs only allow for Diamond armor, and the blue diamond color doesn't pair well with all skins, but this pale variant often does! Enjoy!

To install, simply download the zip file and place it in your Minecraft resourcepack folder.
